design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate side-scrolling stages, defeat enemies and bosses using katana/kusarigama melee combat with special abilities, manage vitality and weapon levels across 5 levels with 14 stages
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Resource management (vitality as currency for special attacks and weapon degradation) combined with combat execution against escalating enemy patterns
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Dual ninja assassins infiltrating a futuristic stronghold to eliminate a dictator; emphasis on martial mastery and cooperation
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Natsume's deliberate take on Ninja Gaiden with mandatory co-op support as a differentiator; weapon degradation system where taking damage reduces attack power (forcing risk-reward decisions); special attacks consume health rather than a separate meter, creating genuine cost-benefit tension

difficulty.lives_system: Five total continues shared between co-op players; game ends on vitality depletion
difficulty.continues_system: Five continues total per playthrough; continues are shared in two-player mode
difficulty.checkpointing: Health carries across stages until recovered with potions or death; no mid-stage checkpoints documented
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Weapon choice (katana vs kusarigama) provides tactical flexibility; special attack usage is player-gated by health threshold (requires >50% vitality); consumable shuriken and grenades add resource-management depth

progression.upgrade_system: Weapon power levels (up to 3 increments per weapon type by collecting duplicate boxes); weapon swapping between katana and kusarigama; secret dual-wield unlock hidden in certain levels; consumable projectiles (shuriken, grenades)
progression.unlock_mechanism: Stage progression is linear; hidden level select accessible via button codes; secret power-ups unlock dual-weapon capability
replayability_hooks: Two playable characters (Hayate and Kaede) with identical mechanics but potential cosmetic differentiation
Weapon degradation on damage creates variable playthroughs based on damage taken
Level select cheat enables speedrun/challenge routing

world_building_techniques: Intro cutscene establishes dictator Emperor Garuda's occupation of futuristic New York City
Two ninja protagonists (Lord Hayate, Lady Kaede) from Iga clan sent as assassins
Environmental setting (2029 dystopian USA stronghold) provides backdrop; no documented environmental storytelling within stages

environmental_storytelling: Futuristic New York City setting suggests technological advancement under authoritarian rule
Five-level stronghold structure implies hierarchical fortress design

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Shadow of the Ninja)
